title_en: The Grain Pyramid: How It Tipped Our Scales
title_es: La Pirámide de Granos: Cómo Desbalanceó Nuestro Peso
hook_en: Did you know this food pyramid was built on lies?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que esta pirámide alimenticia fue construida sobre mentiras?
key_message: The 1992 USDA food pyramid was heavily influenced by grain industry lobbying, recommending an excessive intake of grains, impacting obesity rates.
visual_elements: A flip from the USDA food pyramid chart to viewers eating different sizes of bread
Graphs showing the increase in obesity rates overlaying the pyramid image
A comparison of portion sizes from 1992 to today
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 1992: USDA Food Pyramid released — Impact: Heavily influenced by grain/dairy industry lobbying — recommended 6-11 servings of grains daily

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: Banned in Europe, But on Your Plate?
title_es: ¿Prohibido en Europa, Pero en Tu Plato?
hook_en: Why is this toxic additive still in our food?
hook_es: ¿Por qué este aditivo tóxico sigue en nuestra comida?
key_message: Some additives banned in Europe for health reasons are still allowed in the US, contributing to health issues like obesity.
visual_elements: Side-by-side comparison of food labels from US and European products
Close-up of food additive names with a red 'X' over European ones
Overlay of health statistics related to obesity with these additives
props_needed: US and European food product labels
